title: Real Time
content:
- [[Real Time]] interaction engines for live
- TOOLL3 is touch designer light ish? [[Touch Designer]] offworld allows integration with [[Unreal]] and NDI spout connection to [[ComfyUI]]
- [TROIKATRONIX : ISADORA - Real-Time and Interactive](https://troikatronix.com/isadora/real-time-and-interactive/)
- [TOOLL3 - Open Source Motion Graphics](https://tooll.io/)
- [google-ai-edge/mediapipe: Cross-platform, customizable ML solutions for live and streaming media. (github.com)](https://github.com/google-ai-edge/mediapipe) using OSC for sending
- [Notch - Notch Builder - Real-time Visual Effects Tool](https://www.notch.one/products/notch-builder/) similar to TOOLL3 but expensive
